description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Upload source files to Crowdin that triggers on push to specific English language file paths in the master branch and on workflow dispatch. In an ubuntu-latest job running in a devkitpro/devkitarm container, check out the repository with recursive submodules, configure git safe directories, install Python, build a package with make, and upload source files to Crowdin using the crowdin/github-action with a CROWDIN_TOKEN from secrets.
